---
name: Good First Issue (maintainers only)
about: Create a scoped task for new contributors
title: ''
labels: good first issue, help wanted
---

**Summary**
What needs to be done, in one or two sentences.

**Details**
- Which file(s) to look at:
- What the change should do:
- How to verify it works:

**Useful context**
Links to relevant code, docs, or prior discussion.

**Mentorship**
A maintainer is available to review your PR and help if you get stuck. Ask questions in the issue or in [Discussions](https://github.com/turnert2005/artefex/discussions).
